Intraday post (10/March)

Weekly post:

Forecasts are coming true | Weekly post (09-13/March)

I spent the past two weeks to explain agin Iran and the oil-related risk for you both on Twitter and here as well. Also dropped a big summary of geopolitical situation for better clarity.

Weekly post said risk-on for Monday. Downside is expected to be protected, such as energy prices on the short run. Hence my “short backwardation” trade call on oil. It is playing out.

Volume is elevated for today, dealer flow has less impact. Spot remains under pressure, and weekly expectation supports that.

ES futs momentum-pivot is at 6860Downside vondirmation below 6760

ES futs momentum-pivot is at 6860Downside vondirmation below 6760

Let’s see today’s positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Net speed profile is negative, and the vol buying activity is stronger to the upside, while they expect slight stabilization downward. Upside vvol is sold.

Centroid is at 6798.84Locally, the centroid is sticky during the PM, but weak.

Downside pivot is at 6725.82with target of 6662.42The pivot is a high probability reversion line now back towards the centroid. It becomes more vulnerable into the afternoon session, and towards the target market is betting on a local ‘brake’, and stabilizing around 6685 to 6700

Upside pivot is at 6842.76with target of 6854.57The pivot is sticky here, and the target is a high probability reversion level back towards the pivot. I would add 6870 as a margin of error, if vol catches up above the pivot. But market bets on brake.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
